---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# exculding momentum

* get shadows of subsystem


```{julia}
using RandomMeas
include("./08_RandomMeasAdd/src/RandomMeasAdd.jl")
using .RandomMeasAdd
```

```{julia}
# get sub shadows
N = 8
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit", N)
group_path = "./04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/random_group.npz"
reduced_N = 4
sub_range = [x for pair = 3:3 + reduced_N ÷ 2 - 1 for x in (pair, N - pair + 1)];
sub_group, sub_indices = import_permuted_group(group_path, site_indices, sub_range);
sub_shadows = get_dense_shadows(sub_group);
```

## trace

```{julia}
# tr(ρ)
#@show estimate, bias, sem = get_trace_moment(dense_shadows, 1, compute_sem = true); # Cross-validation, but it consumes a lot of memory.
@show estimate = get_trace_moment(sub_shadows, 1);
```

```{julia}
# tr(ρ^2)
#@show estimate, bias, sem = get_trace_moment(dense_shadows, 2, compute_sem = true);
@show estimate = get_trace_moment(sub_shadows, 2);
```

```{julia}
# multiply
multiply(sub_shadows[1], sub_shadows[1]);
```
